ml_prediction.predicted_fault:
APU BGA solder joint failure (thermal stress)
Corrupted Syscon firmware or EEPROM data
Faulty Southbridge (Aeolia/Belize) communication
Power rail instability (specifically 1.8V or 2.5V rails feeding the APU/Southbridge)
ml_prediction.bench_steps:
Verify all secondary power rails (1.8V, 2.5V, 3.3V) are stable at the APU and Southbridge test points during the boot sequence; ripple or voltage drops here often trigger F0000001 errors.
Inspect the board for physical signs of APU stress or previous reflow attempts; perform a light pressure test on the APU die while powering on to see if the error code changes or the console progresses further.
C
